asset-vault.title: Asset Vault
asset-vault.settings.useDefaultPicker.hi: Disable Asset Vault and use Foundry's built-in file picker instead. Requires a page reload.
asset-vault.settings.viewMode.name: Default View Mode
asset-vault.settings.viewMode.hint: Choose whether assets are displayed as a grid or a list by default.
asset-vault.settings.detachedMode.name: Detached Window
asset-vault.settings.detachedMode.hint: Open the Asset Vault in a detached, resizable window.
asset-vault.settings.showAutoTags.name: Show Auto-Generated Tags
asset-vault.settings.showAutoTags.hint: Display automatically generated tags alongside user-defined tags in the asset browser.
asset-vault.settings.enableForPlayers.hi: Allow non-GM players to use the Asset Vault file picker.
asset-vault.settings.scanLocations.name: Scan Locations
asset-vault.settings.scanLocations.label: Configure
